name: Nimbus Digital
mission: Ship reliable software for mid-market clients without the chaos of ad-hoc project management.
culture: Sprint-disciplined and blameless-retro focused. People here are expected to raise blockers loudly and early.

name: Atlas Manufacturing
mission: World-class manufacturing discipline — every defect has a root cause, and every root cause gets fixed once, not patched repeatedly.
culture: Lean-first and data-driven. Line staff and engineers alike are expected to know their process' current defect rate from memory.

name: Meridian Freight Group
mission: Keep goods moving reliably across a fragmented, multi-carrier European logistics network.
culture: Detail-obsessed and calm under disruption — a delayed shipment is a puzzle to solve, not a crisis to panic over.

name: Verde Hospitality Group
mission: Consistently excellent guest experience across a growing group of restaurants, without losing what makes each one distinct.
culture: Fast-paced and guest-obsessed. Managers and chefs are expected to make good calls under real dinner-service pressure.

name: Ledger & Co.
mission: Accurate, defensible financial reporting for mid-sized clients — no shortcuts, no surprises at audit time.
culture: Precise and process-driven. Accountants here are expected to explain any number they report, not just produce it.

name: Beacon Communications
mission: Help clients say the right thing, to the right audience, especially when it's hardest to do so.
culture: Fast-moving and calm under media pressure. PR specialists are expected to have a draft ready before the news cycle moves on.

name: Lumen Learning Group
mission: Design training and education programs that actually change what people can do, not just what they've sat through.
culture: Evidence-based and learner-centered. Program managers are expected to redesign based on completion data, not instinct.
